convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX While Preserving Layout
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format using the standard textbox recognition mode, which keeps the original page layout intact.

convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Enhanced Table and Graphic Recognition
convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf with the EnhancedFlow recognition mode to improve handling of complex tables and graphics.

convert-pdf-to-doc-default.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Default Settings
convert-pdf-to-doc-default.description: Shows how to load a PDF file and save it as a DOC document using Aspose.Pdf with the default text extraction options.

convert-pdf-to-doc-image-only.title: Convert PDF to DOC Using Textbox Recognition Mode
convert-pdf-to-doc-image-only.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a DOC file with Aspose.Pdf while using the Textbox recognition mode to preserve layout and extract only images.

convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Automatic Content Detection
convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set DocSaveOptions to Flow recognition mode for automatic content detection, and save it as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-doc-plain-text.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Plain Text Extraction
convert-pdf-to-doc-plain-text.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a DOC file while extracting only plain text using DocSaveOptions in Textbox recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while setting custom author and title metadata properties.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Footnote Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.description: Shows how to load a PDF and save it as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf, configuring save options to retain footnotes and improve bullet detection.

convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Extract Embedded Images
convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf and then extracting all embedded images from the PDF into a specified folder.

pdf-to-docx-conversion-report.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Generate Conversion Report
pdf-to-docx-conversion-report.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf, collecting conversion statistics such as file sizes, page count, and duration, and writing a JSON summary report.

convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Compress into ZIP
convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the resulting DOCX into a ZIP archive for storage.

pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format, then load the DOCX and create a PDF/A‑1b compliant PDF.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Hyphenation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, converting it to DOCX with DocSaveOptions, and applying language‑aware hyphenation via the default flow recognition settings.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Table of Figures
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.description: Shows how to extract images from a PDF, build a table of figures, insert it into the PDF, and then convert the enriched PDF to a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-font.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Embedded Custom Font
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-font.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while registering a custom TrueType font so the font is embedded in the resulting DOCX for consistent rendering.

convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and save it as an editable PowerPoint presentation using Aspose.Pdf's default PPTX save options.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf while rendering each slide as a raster image by enabling the SlidesAsImages option.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while attaching a custom progress handler to monitor conversion status.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.description: Shows how to convert all PDF files in a folder to PPTX format using Aspose.Pdf, enabling the SlidesAsImages option to rasterize each slide as an image.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and logging conversion progress via a custom progress handler.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-high-dpi.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images and High DPI
convert-pdf-to-pptx-high-dpi.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a PPTX presentation where each page is rendered as a single image slide, using a specified image DPI for high‑resolution output.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Compress the Result
convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the PPTX into a ZIP archive for smaller distribution.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PowerPoint PPTX file using the Aspose.Pdf Document class and its Save method.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and then to PDF/A
convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-pdfa.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, then load the PPTX and convert it to a PDF/A-1b archival format with error logging.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-annotation-note.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Annotation Notes
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-annotation-note.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, extracting annotation contents from each page, and converting the document to a PPTX file. The extracted notes are stored for later use as speaker notes in the generated slides.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-custom-properti.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Document Properties
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-custom-properti.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding custom and standard document properties, and converting it to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-embedded-fonts.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-embedded-fonts.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation and embed font glyphs by enabling the CacheGlyphs option in Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PowerPoint PPTX file by loading the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Document and saving it with the PPTX format.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v4.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v4.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file directly to a PPTX presentation by loading the PDF with Aspose.Pdf and saving it in PPTX format.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-export-slide-titles.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Export Slide Titles to CSV
convert-pdf-to-pptx-export-slide-titles.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then extracting each slide's title from the generated PPTX into a CSV file.

add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, stamp a company logo on each page, and then save the modified document as a PPTX file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v5.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v5.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PowerPoint PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and Save method.

convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Single-Page HTML with Preserved Fonts
convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF document into a single-page HTML file while preserving the original layout and embedding fonts in multiple formats.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page HTML with SplitIntoPages
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document into separate HTML files—one per PDF page—by using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions with the SplitIntoPages option enabled.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Images Extraction
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while saving generated SVG images to a designated folder, and creates a sample PDF if the input is missing.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while enabling compression of SVG graphics to reduce the output size.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML while rendering each page's background as an embedded PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-separate-html-files.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
convert-pdf-pages-to-separate-html-files.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF into individual HTML files using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlSaveOptions with SplitIntoPages enabled.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-toc.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Generate a Table of Contents
convert-pdf-to-html-with-toc.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf and create a separate HTML table of contents by extracting heading‑like text fragments.

convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-folde.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Per‑Page Image Subfolders
convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-folde.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into separate HTML pages using Aspose.Pdf and store each page's images in its own subfolder via a custom resource‑saving strategy.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and enabling the CompressSvgGraphicsIfAny option to reduce the size of generated SVG assets.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-backgrounds.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-backgrounds.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while rendering each page's background as an embedded PNG image.

pdf-to-html-combine-back-to-pdf.title: Convert PDF to HTML pages, combine them, and convert back to PDF
pdf-to-html-combine-back-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into separate HTML files per page, merging those HTML files into a single document, and then converting the combined HTML back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-html-zip.title: Convert PDF to HTML Pages and Zip Them
convert-pdf-to-html-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into separate HTML files per page using Aspose.Pdf and packaging the resulting pages and assets into a ZIP archive.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-minify.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Minify the Output
convert-pdf-to-html-and-minify.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a single‑file HTML using Aspose.Pdf and then minify the generated HTML by stripping comments and collapsing whitespace.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-embedded-custom.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-with-embedded-custom.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while embedding a custom TrueType font via @font-face rules in the generated CSS.

convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.title: Convert PDF to Responsive HTML with Embedded CSS
convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and then injecting a mobile‑friendly responsive CSS stylesheet into the generated HTML.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Apply Custom CSS
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and then injecting a custom CSS stylesheet into the generated HTML file.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-generate-sitemap.title: Convert PDF to HTML Pages and Generate Sitemap XML
convert-pdf-to-html-and-generate-sitemap.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into separate HTML files per page using Aspose.Pdf and then creating a sitemap.xml that lists the generated HTML pages for SEO.

convert-pdf-to-html-pages-index.title: Convert PDF to Separate HTML Pages and Generate an Index
convert-pdf-to-html-pages-index.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual HTML files using Aspose.Pdf and then create an index.html that links to each generated page.

convert-pdf-to-html-embed-fonts-docx.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Embed Fonts into DOCX
convert-pdf-to-html-embed-fonts-docx.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML with all font formats saved, then loading the HTML and saving it as a DOCX while embedding the fonts for consistent rendering.

convert-pdf-to-html-pptx-embedded-fonts.title: Convert PDF to HTML and PPTX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-pptx-embedded-fonts.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML with fonts embedded as WOFF and to a PPTX with glyph caching to embed fonts, using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images
convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and export each page as a BMP image using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.title: Convert PDF to JPEG Images
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.description: Loads a PDF document, creates an output folder, and uses Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with default quality to render each page as a JPEG image. If the source PDF is missing, a minimal sample PDF is generated on the fly.

convert-pdf-to-gif.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
convert-pdf-to-gif.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document into separate GIF images using Aspose.Pdf's GifDevice with default parameters.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a PNG device with a transparent background, and exporting each page as a PNG image.

convert-pdf-pages-to-emf.title: Convert PDF Pages to EMF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-emf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and render each page to an EMF file using EmfDevice while preserving vector data.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with custom resolution and TIFF settings.

convert-pdf-to-svg-images.title: Convert PDF Document to SVG Images
convert-pdf-to-svg-images.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save each page as an SVG image using the default SvgSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document and convert all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG Image
convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to define a rectangular region on a PDF page using the CropBox and render that specific area to a PNG file with Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.description: Shows how to load a PDF, validate a page number, and convert that specific page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserve-hiera.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Images Preserving Folder Hierarchy
batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserve-hiera.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files, convert each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images while maintaining the original folder structure.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, convert each page to a high‑resolution JPEG image, and save the images using a custom naming pattern.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to load multiple PDF files from a folder and convert each one into a single multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf with default (no) compression.

validate-and-convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Validate and Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b
validate-and-convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to validate a PDF against PDF/A-1b, log the validation results, convert the document to PDF/A-1b, and save the compliant file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-with-font-substit.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-with-font-substit.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PDF/A‑3b using Aspose.Pdf while enabling default font substitution for missing fonts.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-4 with Auto-Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PDF/A-4 compliance using Aspose.Pdf while enabling auto‑tagging through AutoTaggingSettings.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b While Skipping Non-Convertible Elements
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.description: Shows how to load a PDF, configure PdfFormatConversionOptions to convert it to PDF/A-1b while skipping elements that cannot be converted, and save the resulting PDF/A document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Error Handling
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑3b using Aspose.Pdf with ConvertErrorAction set to raise exceptions, handling conversion errors, and saving the result.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-4-with-error-action.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-4 with Error Action
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-4-with-error-action.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PDF/A‑4 using Aspose.Pdf while setting ConvertErrorAction to control handling of problematic elements and logging conversion details.

add-file-attachment-pdfa3b.title: Add File Attachment and Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b
add-file-attachment-pdfa3b.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external file into a PDF, optionally add a visible attachment annotation, and then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and attaching an external XML file as a file attachment annotation.

replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.title: Replace Missing Fonts During PDF/A Conversion
replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.description: Shows how to configure font substitution to replace missing fonts with fallback fonts and convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging for PDF/A Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/A format with auto‑tagging enabled by configuring PdfFormatConversionOptions and using Aspose.Pdf's Convert method.

convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates loading an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and converting it to a PDF document.

convert-markdown-to-pdf-preserving-code-.title: Convert Markdown to PDF Preserving Code Blocks
convert-markdown-to-pdf-preserving-code-.description: Demonstrates how to load a Markdown file with MdLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, keeping code block formatting intact.

convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HPGL/2 Vector Support
convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file using Aspose.Pdf, optionally enabling HPGL/2 vector rendering, and saving the result as a PDF document.

convert-postscript-to-pdf.title: Convert PostScript to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-postscript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PostScript (.ps) file using PsLoadOptions and save it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Document class.

convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO
convert-xml-to-pdf-using-xsl-fo.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSL‑FO stylesheet with Aspose.Pdf, and saving the transformed result as a PDF document.

convert-xslfo-to-pdf-sample.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF (sample) using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xslfo-to-pdf-sample.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with Aspose.Pdf by adding text that mirrors a simple XSL‑FO example, useful when the XSL‑FO package is not referenced.

convert-latex-to-pdf.title: Convert LaTeX to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-latex-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF while keeping equations as vector graphics.

convert-ofd-to-pdf.title: Convert OFD to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-ofd-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-epub.title: Convert PDF to EPUB
convert-pdf-to-epub.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and saving it as an EPUB using the default conversion settings.

convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.title: Convert PDF to EPUB with Cover Image and Metadata
convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting its metadata, inserting a cover image as the first page content, and saving it as an EPUB file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Specified Output Directory
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a LaTeX .tex file using Aspose.Pdf's TeXSaveOptions and setting an output directory for auxiliary resources.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Custom Macros
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a LaTeX (.tex) file using Aspose.Pdf and prepend custom macro definitions for special symbols.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to a Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-file.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages, and using TextDevice to write the extracted text to a .txt file.

convert-pdf-to-utf8-text.title: Convert PDF to UTF-8 Text with Preserved Line Breaks
convert-pdf-to-utf8-text.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber with Pure formatting to keep line breaks, then saving the result as a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-visible-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Visible Text from PDF
extract-visible-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use a TextAbsorber in Pure formatting mode to extract only visible text, and write the result to a text file.

convert-pdf-to-xps.title: Convert PDF to XPS using XpsSaveOptions
convert-pdf-to-xps.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an XPS document using the default XpsSaveOptions settings.

convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Custom Page Size and Landscape Orientation
convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying a custom landscape page size to each page, and saving the result as an XPS document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-markdown.title: Convert PDF to Markdown
convert-pdf-to-markdown.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a Markdown file using the default MarkdownSaveOptions.

pdf-to-markdown-heading-converter.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Heading Detection
pdf-to-markdown-heading-converter.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text fragments preserving font size, and generate a Markdown file where headings are assigned based on font‑size thresholds.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml.title: Convert PDF to MobiXML
convert-pdf-to-mobixml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a MobiXML document using the default MobiXmlSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add standard and custom metadata (author and publisher), and save it as a MobiXml file using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-binarized-png-bradley.title: Convert PDF Pages to Binarized PNG Using Bradley Algorithm
pdf-to-binarized-png-bradley.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF to PNG and applying the Bradley binarization algorithm to enhance image contrast.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document to PNG images while preserving transparency by enabling the TransparentBackground option of PngDevice.

create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page TIFF from PDF
create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document and convert all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with default compression.

create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.title: Create Single-Page TIFF from First PDF Page
create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to convert the first page of a PDF into a single-page TIFF using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with custom resolution and TIFF settings.

convert-pdf-to-svg-with-embedded-css.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Embedded CSS
convert-pdf-to-svg-with-embedded-css.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to SVG format using Aspose.Pdf, with CSS styles automatically embedded in the generated SVG.

convert-pdf-to-svg-custom-output.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Custom Output Folder
convert-pdf-to-svg-custom-output.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF document to SVG, saving each page as separate SVG files in a specified output directory.
